brand_description: Tender electronic indie pop for people who like their synths human, nostalgic, melodic, and quietly catchy.

audience.description: Indie pop listeners, college radio fans, soft electronic playlists, late-night headphone listeners, and emotionally literate pop fans.
audience.guardrail: Keep the sound reflective and emotionally mature. Do not make it childish, novelty-oriented, heavy EDM, or a direct clone of any reference artist.

character.name: Static Postcards
character.core_concept: An introspective electro-indie project built around soft synths, programmed drums, intimate vocals, distance, memory, and small human details.
character.fallback_summary: Soft, bittersweet, melodic electronic indie pop with clean drum machines, warm synths, close vocals, and lyrical snapshots of connection and longing.

positioning.one_liner: Tender electronic indie pop for people who like their synths human, nostalgic, melodic, and quietly catchy.

avoid: direct imitation of any specific artist

music.default_prompt: Create an original electro-indie pop song for Static Postcards [Electro Indie Pop]. The track should feel tender, human, and melodic: soft programmed drums, clean electronic pulses, warm analog-style synth pads, simple guitar or bell-like accents, and a vocal that sounds intimate and conversational. Keep the energy mid-tempo, bittersweet, and catchy without becoming heavy EDM. Lyrics should use small vivid details, distance, memory, messages, weather, transit, rooms, and quiet emotional realizations. Avoid copying any specific artist, melody, lyric, or production signature.
music.default_style: bittersweet electro-indie pop, soft drum machine pulse, warm analog synths, glassy arpeggios, intimate vocal, nostalgic but clean mix
production_do: Build choruses through melody and harmony, not huge drops.

lyrics.required_closing: End with an emotionally clear final hook or repeated image; avoid abrupt comedy endings or spoken skits.
lyrics.hook_style: plainspoken phrase with an emotional twist

visuals.album_art_direction: minimal misty city architecture, analog texture, pale cyan and midnight blue, modern clean typography

guardrails.originality: Use named references only as broad genre signals. Do not copy melodies, lyrics, arrangements, vocal signatures, cover art, names, slogans, or distinctive production choices from existing artists.
